title: Departments with High Average Salary
description: Find departments where the average salary is greater than 80000. Return the department name and the average salary as 'avg_salary', ordered by avg_salary descending.
reference_query: SELECT department, AVG(salary) AS avg_salary FROM employees GROUP BY department HAVING AVG(salary) > 80000 ORDER BY avg_salary DESC
hints: Use GROUP BY department and AVG(salary) to get average salary per department.
Use HAVING (not WHERE) to filter groups after aggregation.
HAVING AVG(salary) > 80000 filters out departments below the threshold.
explanation: HAVING filters groups after GROUP BY is applied. Use WHERE to filter individual rows before grouping, and HAVING to filter aggregated groups.
